title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 22 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 22 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 22 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.87 % today, the main contract closed at 871.5. The traders' willingness to ship is excellent.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
